title: 凛心黛纳
content_json: [{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"key":"0.36377713262160137","type":"illustrated-book","data":[{"key":"0.621db263ecdb","type":"tab-info","data":{"title":"","tabList":[{"key":"0.ecc481237e84","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-1","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_1920/h_1080/50364/842288/2026/3/8/957527.jpg"],"type":"image"},{"key":"0.ab8be2dcb30cd","isShowTopDesc":false,"isShowBottomDesc":false,"title":"立绘-2","icon":"","content":["//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_307/h_467/50364/842288/2026/3/8/785909.jpg"],"type":"image"}]}},{"key":"0.789fde19d2ffa","type":"character-profile","data":{"isShowImageList":true,"isShowName":true,"isShowAttrList":true,"isShowDesc":true,"title":"基本资料","name":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凛心黛纳"}]}]},"descTitle":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者协会评定"}]}]},"desc":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"异格者凛心黛纳，Re-A芯片状态正常，未见异常波动。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"来自海德拉银行奥芙里斯分行，是奥芙里斯分行下属第七、第十四分行的执行经理人。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"黛纳认真，谨慎，极度负责，是事事都要做到完美的顶尖精英，但也非常害怕犯错，表面冷静，但内心会非常在意可能会有的隐藏失误。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"此前，赫尔基德给银行带来巨大了损失。为了挽回损失，以宁芙涅为首，奥芙里斯分行下属所有的经理人都承受了巨大的压力。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"黛纳则接下了这次事件最棘手的部分，她会暂时负责处理赫尔基德留下的第七分行相关的事务，在有经济署调查小组入驻调查的情况下，去协助处理第七分行内出现的坏账。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"短时间内，黛纳在配合经济署调查小组展开调查的同时也用自己高效、妥当的行事风格，获取了两家分行内部留守职员的信任。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"在此过程中，黛纳展现出极强的应对能力，拉上了几位值得信任的帮手，处理了第七分行的部分坏账。"}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"更重要的是，保全了第七分行和第十四分行最有价值的客户资产。"}]}]},"attrList":[{"key":"0.bfc12efaafc","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"稀有度"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"SR"}]}]}},{"key":"0.502fb7b7fb545","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"原质属性"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"恒定"},{"type":"image","src":"//cdnimg-v2.gamekee.com/wiki2.0/images/w_56/h_56/50364/842288/2026/3/8/350894.png","href":"","alt":"","style":{"width":"auto","verticalAlign":"middle","height":"22px"},"children":[{"text":""}]},{"text":""}]}]}},{"key":"0.9099e02f2af1c","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"所属势力"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"海德拉银行"}]}]}},{"key":"0.41ce1002b410d","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"称号"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"凛光剑心"}]}]}},{"key":"0.14f327b6b15db","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"性别"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"女"}]}]}},{"key":"0.6eb19b12c8557","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"职业"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"经理人"}]}]}},{"key":"0.580b0d8414465","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"身份识别码"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"/"}]}]}},{"key":"0.13653ada819cf","title":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"ReA芯片状态"}]}]},"content":{"type":"simpleEditor","data":[{"type":"paragraph","children":[{"text":"正常"}]}]}}],"imageSize":{"width":130,"h
